title: All The Animals Ranked By Comedians
description: All the Animals: Ranked (by Comedians) is a panel show where comedians battle it out to determine the ultimate list of the best (and worst) animals, with an ever-evolving leader board plus animal-themed games. It's a funny spin on our furry, feathery, finny friends, by a panel of (not quite) tame comedians. Featuring host Leslie Gold (as seen at the Comedy Store and the Hackney Empire) and guest comedians including Mitch Benn and Stefania Licari! From the creator of the hit Edinburgh Fringe panel show, 101 Rules for a Better World (by Comedians). Note strong language is possible, silliness is guaranteed, and the lineup may be subject to change.

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
